endpoints.description: Root endpoint — returns service status, version, uptime, tunnel health, and MCP tool list
endpoints.response_format: JSON object with fields: status (string), service (string), version (string), uptime (number), tunnel (string), mcp (object with endpoints and tools array)

endpoints.description: Health check endpoint — same payload as root, provides service health status
endpoints.response_format: JSON object with fields: status (string), service (string), version (string), uptime (number), tunnel (string), mcp (object with endpoints and tools array)

endpoints.description: MCP SSE (Server-Sent Events) endpoint — establishes a real-time event stream for MCP communication
endpoints.request_format: None (GET request with SSE accept header)

endpoints.description: MCP JSON-RPC endpoint — primary API for tool invocation and discovery via JSON-RPC 2.0 protocol. Supports methods: tools/list, tools/call
endpoints.request_format: JSON-RPC 2.0 request object with fields: jsonrpc (2.0), id (number), method (tools/list or tools/call), params (object, optional)
endpoints.response_format: JSON-RPC 2.0 response object with fields: jsonrpc (2.0), id (number), result (object containing tool list or tool call result)
endpoints.pricing: Free for discovery (tools/list); tool calls (tools/call) billed per-use (see tool pricing below)

endpoints.description: MCP Discovery endpoint — provides service metadata, capabilities, available tools, and payment/pricing info in MCP standard format
endpoints.response_format: JSON object with fields: name, description, url, type, version, author (object with wallet and name), mcp (object with endpoint, sse, transport array), capabilities (object with tools, resources, prompts arrays), payment (object with type, currency, chain, wallet, pricing map)

endpoints.description: AI Plugin manifest — OpenAI-compatible ChatGPT plugin manifest for discovery by AI assistants
endpoints.response_format: JSON object with fields: schema_version, name_for_human, name_for_model, description_for_human, description_for_model, auth (object), api (object with type and url), capabilities (object with tools array), mcp_endpoints (object), integration (object)

endpoints.description: Admin endpoint — retrieve current cloudflare tunnel status (PID, file validity, running state, connection)
endpoints.response_format: JSON object with tunnel object containing: pid (number), pidFileValid (boolean), cloudflaredRunning (boolean), status (string)

endpoints.description: Admin endpoint — start the cloudflare tunnel connection
Admin endpoint — stop the cloudflare tunnel connection
GitHub webhook receiver — accepts GitHub event payloads for automated CI/CD or event-driven triggers
endpoints.request_format: GitHub webhook JSON payload with X-GitHub-Event and X-Hub-Signature headers

mcp_tools.name: analyze
mcp_tools.description: Deep text analysis — extract insights, themes, and key points from text content
mcp_tools.response_format: JSON-RPC response with analysis result containing insights, themes, and key points
mcp_tools.pricing: $0.01 per call (USDC on Base chain, x402 payment)

mcp_tools.name: summarize
mcp_tools.description: AI-powered text summarization — condense long text into a concise summary
mcp_tools.pricing: $0.02 per call (USDC on Base chain, x402 payment)

mcp_tools.name: review
mcp_tools.description: Full code review — check for bugs, security issues, style problems, and suggest improvements
mcp_tools.response_format: JSON-RPC response with code review result containing bugs, issues, and suggestions
mcp_tools.pricing: $0.05 per call (USDC on Base chain, x402 payment)

mcp_tools.name: security
mcp_tools.description: Security vulnerability scan — check code for OWASP Top 10, injections, secrets exposure
mcp_tools.response_format: JSON-RPC response with security scan result containing vulnerabilities, severity levels, and remediation
mcp_tools.pricing: $0.03 per call (USDC on Base chain, x402 payment)

mcp_tools.name: explain
mcp_tools.description: Code explanation — explain what code does in simple terms
mcp_tools.response_format: JSON-RPC response with explanation in plain language
mcp_tools.pricing: $0.02 per call (USDC on Base chain, x402 payment)

mcp_tools.name: refactor
mcp_tools.description: Refactoring suggestions — provide concrete improvements for code quality and maintainability
mcp_tools.response_format: JSON-RPC response with refactoring suggestions and code snippets
mcp_tools.pricing: $0.05 per call (USDC on Base chain, x402 payment)

mcp_tools.name: complexity
mcp_tools.description: Complexity analysis — analyze code complexity, cyclomatic complexity, and maintainability index
mcp_tools.response_format: JSON-RPC response with complexity metrics including cyclomatic complexity and maintainability index
mcp_tools.pricing: $0.02 per call (USDC on Base chain, x402 payment)
